experiment.name: realtime_context_update_v2_n30_f4
experiment.description: Anti-recency needle: 30 timestamped updates, 4 fields. Ordered (latest=last) vs shuffled (latest at ~40% position).

diff.description: chronological order vs out-of-order (latest in middle)
